page_metadata.biotools__summary: GRAPE 2.0 provides an extensive pipeline for RNA-Seq analyses. It allows the creation of an automated and integrated workflow to manage, analyse and visualize RNA-Seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GRAPE 2.0 provides an extensive pipeline for RNA-Seq analyses. It allows the creation of an automated and integrated workflow to manage, analyse and visualize RNA-Seq data.
